name: bloodbank-performance-tests
description: k6 performance test suite for the BloodBank platform

scripts.test:all-load: k6 run tests/donor-registration.js && k6 run tests/blood-request.js && k6 run tests/inventory-search.js && k6 run tests/dashboard-load.js && k6 run tests/report-generation.js && k6 run tests/mixed-workload.js

notes.k6-installation: k6 is NOT installed via npm. Install it separately: https://k6.io/docs/getting-started/installation/
notes.linux: sudo apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv-keys C5AD17C747E3415A3642D57D77C6C491D6AC1D69 && echo 'deb https://dl.k6.io/deb stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/k6.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install k6
